prompt_text:
Analyze the following java source code for violations of the Open/Closed Principle (OCP).

Use a TWO-STAGE reasoning process:

## Stage 1 — List design smells (silent, for your own reasoning)
Identify relevant low-level design smells you observe in the code:
- God Class, Feature Envy, Shotgun Surgery, Divergent Change
- Long Method, Large Class, Long Parameter List
- Refused Bequest, Inappropriate Intimacy, Message Chains
- Switch Statements on type, Data Clumps
Think through these internally. D...
raw_response:
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/config/ir/compiler/EventCondition.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.config.ir.compiler.EventCondition.Compiler.buildCondition",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 90,
      "line_end": 117,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Hardcoded instanceof chain for BooleanExpression compilation",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the buildCondition method uses an explicit instanceof chain to dispatch compilation logic for different BooleanExpression types. Adding a new expression type to the IR requires modifying this central compiler method rather than extending the system through polymorphism or a visitor pattern."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/lib/logstash/config/mixin.rb",
      "entity_name": "LogStash::Config::Mixin::DSL.validate_value",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 351,
      "line_end": 500,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "high",
      "description": "Hardcoded case statement for configuration validators",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the validate_value method uses a massive case statement to handle all possible configuration validators. Adding a new validator type (e.g., :sha_256_hex) requires modifying this core mixin file instead of registering a new validator object in a registry."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/lib/logstash/agent.rb",
      "entity_name": "LogStash::Agent.dispatch_events",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 457,
      "line_end": 468,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Case statement for PipelineAction event dispatching",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because dispatch_events uses a case statement to handle different PipelineAction types (Create, Reload, Stop). Introducing a new action type requires modifying the Agent's event dispatching logic and several other metric-related methods in the same class."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/FieldReference.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.FieldReference.setEscapeStyle",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 53,
      "line_end": 68,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement for FieldReference escape style configuration",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the setEscapeStyle method uses a hardcoded switch statement to map strings to EscapeHandler constants. Adding a new escape style requires modifying this class rather than allowing external registration of handlers."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/health/PipelineIndicator.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.health.PipelineIndicator.StatusProbe.analyze",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 169,
      "line_end": 211,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on pipeline state for health analysis",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the analyze method uses a switch statement on the pipeline state enum. Adding a new state to the pipeline lifecycle requires modifying the health analysis logic within this probe."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/lib/logstash/compiler/lscl.rb",
      "entity_name": "LogStashCompilerLSCLGrammar::LogStash::Compiler::LSCL::AST::Plugin.plugin_type_enum",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 115,
      "line_end": 126,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Case statement mapping section types to Java enums",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because plugin_type_enum uses a case statement to map section types to Java Enums. Adding a new top-level plugin category requires modifying the AST node logic."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/execution/AbstractPipelineExt.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.execution.AbstractPipelineExt.getPipelineSourceDetails",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 620,
      "line_end": 640,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on protocol for pipeline source details",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because getPipelineSourceDetails uses a hardcoded switch on the protocol string. Adding new configuration source types (e.g., a new remote config provider) requires modifying the pipeline metadata logic."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/secret/cli/SecretStoreCli.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.secret.cli.SecretStoreCli.command",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 189,
      "line_end": 286,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement for CLI command dispatching",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the command method uses a switch statement to dispatch CLI logic based on the command type. Adding a new keystore command requires modifying the central CLI entry point."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/plugins/factory/PluginFactoryExt.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.plugins.factory.PluginFactoryExt.plugin",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 169,
      "line_end": 216,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Type checking for plugin delegator initialization",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the plugin method explicitly checks for OUTPUT and FILTER types to apply specific delegator logic. Adding a new plugin type that requires custom initialization requires modifying the factory."
    },
    {
      "file_path": "logstash-core/src/main/java/org/logstash/Event.java",
      "entity_name": "org.logstash.Event.getUnconvertedField",
      "entity_type": "method",
      "line_start": 165,
      "line_end": 174,
      "principle": "OCP",
      "severity": "medium",
      "description": "Switch statement on field type for storage access",
      "reasoning": "Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the method uses a switch on field types (META_PARENT, META_CHILD, etc.) to determine storage access. Adding new event storage scopes requires modifying multiple core methods in the Event class."
    }
  ]
}

Adding a new expression type to the IR requires modifying this central compiler method rather than extending the system through polymorphism or a visitor pattern.
